productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Slate Taupe Fabric Shoe
description: Look well groomed with these shoes from the Slate collection from rockport. Designed for continuous wear and superior walking comfort, these shoes are a great combination of form and function. Team these with chinos and polo neck tees for casual Fridays or for weekend getaways.Upper Resilient forefoot cushioning provides a responsive, dynamic push-off Synthetic woven uppers with full grain leather overlays for greater support and stability Lace-ups for snug Fit Nappa lining for comfort and breath ability Heel cup for sturdy support Padded collar offers protection from excessive rubbing and helps prevent blisters adidas adiPRENE footbed is highly shock-absorbent and protects the heel at impact Midsole Polyurethane (PU) midsole offers durability for long-term wear and shock absorbent-cushioning to help reduce foot fatigue Outsole adidas adiPRENE is a highly shock-absorbent cushioning that protects the heel at impact Rubber outsole with horizontal grooves give dependable grip on a variety of surfaces shoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
